name: Orange Onion Salad with Chili Dressing
recipeIngredient: or 2 cups Bite-sized pieces of cooked Chicken or Beef Steak
1 small Cucumber; ends trimmed, thinly sliced
1 cup Green or red chili dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lettuce in a large, shallow salad bowl.
2. Arrange the shrimp, onion, and cucumber on top of the lettuce.
3. Use a short, sharp knife to remove the peel and white membrane from the oranges.
4. Cut the oranges crosswise into 1/4 inch thick slices and arrange them on the salad.
5. Peel the avocado and remove any seeds, then thinly slice it lengthwise.
6. Place the avocado slices on top of the salad.
7. Pour the chili dressing over the salad and gently mix everything together.
8. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
